name: Cashrewards
one_liner: Australia's largest cashback portal — earn % back at 2,000+ AU retailers.
benefit: Earn 2–20%+ cashback at Woolworths, JB Hi-Fi, eBay AU, Booking.com and hundreds more; cashback paid to your Cashrewards wallet and withdrawable to your bank account.
signup_bonus: ~$10 bonus for new members after first qualifying purchase (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's referral thread
how_to_join.detail: Search OzBargain for 'Cashrewards referral' to find the current exchange thread.

how_to_join.action: Sign up at cashrewards.com.au via the referral link
how_to_join.detail: Create an account with your email; confirm via the verification email.

how_to_join.action: Install the Cashrewards browser extension or app
how_to_join.detail: The extension reminds you when cashback is available and activates it automatically.

how_to_join.action: Make a qualifying purchase via Cashrewards to unlock the signup bonus
how_to_join.detail: Always click through from Cashrewards before adding to cart; disable other extensions temporarily.

risks: Cashback can be tracked then declined if the retailer disputes the referral cookie — keep order records
Bonus cashback terms change frequently; verify the current offer before signing up
Do not use ad-blockers or VPNs during a cashback session as they break tracking
est_value: ~$10 one-off bonus + ongoing 2–20% cashback on everyday purchases
